# CWE-454: MFA policy loaded from server config, not client POST body.
lang: go
file: CWE-454-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

var enforceMFA bool

func BootstrapSecurity(r *gin.Engine, db *gorm.DB) {
	enforceMFA = os.Getenv("ENFORCE_MFA") == "true"
	r.GET("/health", func(c *gin.Context) {
		c.JSON(200, gin.H{"mfa": enforceMFA})
	})
	db.Exec("UPDATE settings SET mfa = ?", enforceMFA)
}
